intro: Elateriopsis oerstedii, also known as Schisandra, is a perennial climbing vine native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, classified as a member of the Schisandraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used to promote overall health and well-being, with reported benefits including enhanced cognitive function, improved cardiovascular health, and increased resistance to stress and fatigue.
